caliber.b_semantics: dp: true DP-attention sequence split; TP rank r serves its own 192 sequences (global rows [r*bl,(r+1)*bl) of B_global=768); full 64 heads and bl KV per GPU; MoE all_gathers 4 distinct row blocks and reduce_scatters each rank's own rows; throughput = B_global / step_wall (measured, no conversion)
caliber.dp_equivalent_note: n/a in dp semantics: throughput is directly measured at B_global; no model-derived conversion is emitted
caliber.kv: seeded decode residency at position 8192 (deterministic-seeded-KV-not-real-prefix, E1a27); max_seq_len=9472
caliber.pipeline_form: serial closed-loop, one token batch in flight
caliber.timing: host walls around torch.cuda.synchronize per component (E0qf serial decomposition caliber)
